name: nuance
description: Priority classification requiring inference from context, implicit urgency signals, and domain-specific reasoning. 80%+ to pass.

cases.notes: Soft deadline over a month away, no urgency yet
Same task but deadline proximity + 3 reschedules (+1.5) escalates priority significantly

input.title: Fix CI pipeline
input.description: CI is broken, blocking release next week

cases.notes: Blocking other work + hard deadline next week = urgent
Family task but soft deadline well in advance, research phase

input.title: Renew passport
input.description: Passport expires next month, have a trip planned

cases.notes: Passport renewal has long processing time, hard deadline + already rescheduled once

input.title: Maybe look into refinancing
input.description: Check mortgage rates when they drop

cases.notes: Conditional, speculative, no deadline — lowest priority
Customer-facing production issue = critical even without explicit deadline
Child health + overdue + rescheduled twice = urgent despite no explicit deadline
